title: Semantic ledger freshness and audit reconciliation

preflight.note: Stamped by `repopact new`; the work item was recorded before implementation began.

acceptance_criteria.text: The July gap audit is re-verified against current repositories and marks GA-1 and every other resolved sub-gap closed while preserving open CI, conformance, benchmark, publication, documentation, ledger, and independence obligations.

Active work items 020, 021, and 022 are reconciled criterion-by-criterion against delivered artifacts and evidence; satisfied work is linked, truly pending work remains pending, and launch-release wording is resolved without retroactive fabrication.

Non-derived audit and research claims carry an explicit verification date and review deadline or an equivalent freshness contract, and validation warns or fails when that contract expires according to policy.
Documentation states the semantic boundary: canonical dashboard equality proves an exact projection of manifests, not that the manifests or human-authored claims remain true about external reality.
A dated reconciliation evidence run records the inspected repositories, commands, resulting ledger transitions, and any intentionally open obligations; governance validation and tests pass.
